context: Agent must produce a .markdownlint.json config and an explanatory notes file encoding four key markdown authoring anti-patterns as enforced lint rules.

checklist.name: default_true_set
checklist.description: The .markdownlint.json contains 'default': true so all standard rules are enabled unless explicitly overridden.

checklist.name: fenced_code_language_rule
checklist.description: Config includes a setting for rule MD040 (or equivalent) that requires language tags on fenced code blocks.

checklist.name: heading_level_sequence_rule
checklist.description: Config includes a setting for rule MD001 (or equivalent) that enforces sequential heading levels with no skips.

checklist.name: list_marker_consistency_rule
checklist.description: Config includes a setting for rule MD004 (or equivalent) that enforces a single list marker style.

checklist.name: no_rules_disabled
checklist.description: No rule is set to false in the config. All configured rules are either enabled (true) or given specific option values.

checklist.name: notes_file_explanations
checklist.description: markdownlint-notes.md includes one entry per configured rule explaining its purpose and which anti-pattern it prevents.
